triple.proud: Began a 40-year obsession that never stopped

triple.what: CTO-level delivery at companies you've heard of -- reporting suites, POS platforms, enterprise systems
triple.proud: Shipped at scale across restaurants, cruise ships, airports

triple.what: Norman Campbell told me you can't argue with right
triple.proud: Changed how I fight -- with facts, not volume

triple.what: Ken Kadlec taught me that everyone knows something you don't, and you know something everyone else doesn't
triple.proud: Learned to listen before solving -- humility as a superpower

triple.what: Built enterprise POS platform used in hospitality for 20+ years -- land, sea, and air
triple.proud: Over a billion hours of combined uptime. The system outlived the company.

triple.what: Fixed a critical production defect near blackout drunk on tequila -- Notepad was my IDE, it compiled, shipped, and worked
triple.proud: The brain and mind are far more powerful than you think

triple.what: The best code is no code. It never breaks and always works.
triple.proud: Simplicity as the ultimate sophistication -- 40 years to learn this

triple.what: Fail fast, fail as fast as you can. In sports I never learned much from winning -- I cherish now the most painful losses
triple.proud: FAIL, UPGRADE, FAIL, UPGRADE forever. The cycle is the growth.

triple.what: Learned that 'for now' equals technical debt -- it grows interest and costs 10x more to remove
triple.proud: Do it right the first time, always. This principle has saved millions.

triple.what: Sometimes it's best to look at things from the solution backward to the request. Identify better versions of the request and shake out the waste.
triple.proud: Find the pure intention behind every ask -- that's where the real solution lives

triple.what: When your brain can no longer find the solution, identify everything you don't know and forget what you do know. Your mind has no choice but to think different.
triple.proud: Discovered the mental reset that unlocks impossible problems

triple.what: Building a platform for mankind -- ai-pantheon.ai, metal, nous -- north star is Build Your Digital Self
triple.proud: Every person deserves a digital identity they own. Not a profile on someone else's platform.

triple.what: Built metal -- bare metal provisioning system. One command, cross-platform, no prerequisites beyond curl.
triple.proud: The provisioner eats its own cooking. Idempotent. Safe to re-run. The structure never drifts.

triple.what: Vision: replace x86 -- build the chip, build the stack, goodbye operating system, hello runtime
triple.proud: Why? Because I can. The binary decision made by hardware engineers in another era is ready to be rethought.

triple.what: Created the Water of Life formula and gave it away free at wateroflife.supply
triple.proud: Some things are too important to sell. Give away the formula, keep the mission.
